name: RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-14
title: Spec invariant numbering is non-sequential (gaps 25-29 split across two sections)
description: spec.md uses invariant numbers across multiple 'Invariants' subsections with overlapping ranges: top-level Invariants 1-10, 25-30 (skipping 11-24), then per-section Invariants 25-29 (rabbit-config), 43-50, 53-60, 11-13, 41-42, 14-19 (Override section), 20-24, 31-35 (Runtime Artifacts), 37-38 (sync-check schema), 51 (Team-wide Permissions), 52 (deny message). The numbering jumps around and is duplicated (multiple 25s and 26s appear in different sections — section 'rabbit-config' lists 25/26/27/28/29 and the top 'Invariants' lists 25-30, both meaning different things). Consider renumbering monotonically with section prefixes (e.g., SURFACE-1, RC-1, OVR-1) to remove ambiguity.

history.note: Deferred: too large/complex for housekeeping waves. Requires dedicated design cycle. Filed for future roadmap consideration.
